hooks.command: ROOT="$PWD"; while [ "$ROOT" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/plugins/buddy/scripts/buddy-state.js" ]; do ROOT="$(dirname "$ROOT")"; done; SCRIPT="$ROOT/plugins/buddy/scripts/buddy-state.js"; if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT" ] && [ -f "$HOME/plugins/buddy/scripts/buddy-state.js" ]; then SCRIPT="$HOME/plugins/buddy/scripts/buddy-state.js"; fi; node "$SCRIPT" hook write
